mapper.select: SELECT I.ILCHON_IDX, I.USER_NO, I.ILCHON_NICK, I.ILCHON_CATE, I.ILCHON_STATUS, I.ILCHON_NO AS "M_USER_NO", M.USER_ID AS "M_USER_ID", M.NAME AS M_NAME, M.SEARCH_ME AS M_SEARCH_ME, M.GENDER AS "M_GENDER" FROM ILCHON I INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON(I.ILCHON_NO = M.USER_NO) WHERE I.USER_NO = #{no} AND I.ILCHON_STATUS = 'Y' AND M.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY M.NAME DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO GIFT ( GIFT_NO, SENDER_NO, RECEIVER_NO, PRODUCT_CODE, SEND_CONTENT, GIFT_DATE, GIFT_PROGRESS, GIFT_CANCEL ) VALUES ( (SELECT NEXTVAL('GIFT_SEQ') FROM DUAL), #{userNo}, #{receiverNo}, #{productCode}, #{content}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
mapper.select: SELECT PRODUCT_CODE, CATEGORY_CODE, PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCT_DATE, STATUS, PRODUCT_FILE, PRODUCT_URL FROM PRODUCT WHERE PRODUCT_CODE = #{productCode} AND STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT USER_NO , USER_ID , USER_PWD , NAME, ROLE, PHONE, EMAIL, BIRTH, ADDRESS, SEARCH_ME , GENDER, MINIMI , CREATE_DATE , ACORN , STATUS FROM MEMBER WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT GIFT_NO, SENDER_NO, RECEIVER_NO, PRODUCT_CODE, SEND_CONTENT, GIFT_DATE, GIFT_PROGRESS, GIFT_CANCEL FROM GIFT WHERE RECEIVER_NO = #{userNo} AND GIFT_PROGRESS = 'H' AND GIFT_CANCEL = 'D'

SELECT G.GIFT_NO, G.PRODUCT_CODE , G.SEND_CONTENT , G.GIFT_DATE , G.GIFT_PROGRESS , G.GIFT_CANCEL , G.SENDER_NO AS S_USER_NO, S.USER_ID AS S_USER_ID, S.NAME AS S_NAME, S.PHONE AS S_PHONE, S.EMAIL AS S_EMAIL, S.BIRTH AS S_BIRTH, S.ADDRESS AS S_ADDRESS, S.SEARCH_ME AS S_SEARCH_ME, S.GENDER AS S_GENDER, S.MINIMI AS S_MINIMI, S.ACORN AS S_ACORN, G.RECEIVER_NO AS R_USER_NO, R.USER_ID AS R_USER_ID, R.NAME AS R_NAME, R.PHONE AS R_PHONE, R.EMAIL AS R_EMAIL, R.BIRTH AS R_BIRTH, R.ADDRESS AS R_ADDRESS, R.SEARCH_ME AS R_SEARCH_ME, R.GENDER AS R_GENDER, R.MINIMI AS R_MINIMI, R.ACORN AS R_ACORN FROM GIFT G INNER JOIN MEMBER S ON (G.SENDER_NO = S.USER_NO) INNER JOIN MEMBER R ON (G.RECEIVER_NO = R.USER_NO) WHERE RECEIVER_NO = #{userNo} AND GIFT_PROGRESS = 'H' AND GIFT_CANCEL = 'D'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GIFT WHERE RECEIVER_NO = #{userNo} AND GIFT_PROGRESS = 'H' AND GIFT_CANCEL = 'D'

SELECT G.GIFT_NO, G.SEND_CONTENT , G.GIFT_DATE , G.GIFT_PROGRESS , G.GIFT_CANCEL , G.SENDER_NO AS S_USER_NO, S.USER_ID AS S_USER_ID, S.NAME AS S_NAME, S.PHONE AS S_PHONE, S.EMAIL AS S_EMAIL, S.BIRTH AS S_BIRTH, S.ADDRESS AS S_ADDRESS, S.SEARCH_ME AS S_SEARCH_ME, S.GENDER AS S_GENDER, S.MINIMI AS S_MINIMI, S.ACORN AS S_ACORN, G.RECEIVER_NO AS R_USER_NO, R.USER_ID AS R_USER_ID, R.NAME AS R_NAME, R.PHONE AS R_PHONE, R.EMAIL AS R_EMAIL, R.BIRTH AS R_BIRTH, R.ADDRESS AS R_ADDRESS, R.SEARCH_ME AS R_SEARCH_ME, R.GENDER AS R_GENDER, R.MINIMI AS R_MINIMI, R.ACORN AS R_ACORN, G.PRODUCT_CODE AS P_PRODUCT_CODE, P.CATEGORY_CODE AS P_CATEGORY_CODE, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS P_PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS P_PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_DATE AS P_PRODUCT_DATE, P.STATUS AS P_STATUS, P.PRODUCT_FILE AS P_PRODUCT_FILE, P.PRODUCT_URL AS P_PRODUCT_URL FROM GIFT G INNER JOIN MEMBER S ON (G.SENDER_NO = S.USER_NO) INNER JOIN MEMBER R ON (G.RECEIVER_NO = R.USER_NO) INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (G.PRODUCT_CODE = P.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE RECEIVER_NO = #{userNo} AND GIFT_PROGRESS = 'H' AND GIFT_CANCEL = 'D'

SELECT G.GIFT_NO, G.SEND_CONTENT , G.GIFT_DATE , G.GIFT_PROGRESS , G.GIFT_CANCEL , G.SENDER_NO AS S_USER_NO, S.USER_ID AS S_USER_ID, S.NAME AS S_NAME, S.PHONE AS S_PHONE, S.EMAIL AS S_EMAIL, S.BIRTH AS S_BIRTH, S.ADDRESS AS S_ADDRESS, S.SEARCH_ME AS S_SEARCH_ME, S.GENDER AS S_GENDER, S.MINIMI AS S_MINIMI, S.ACORN AS S_ACORN, G.RECEIVER_NO AS R_USER_NO, R.USER_ID AS R_USER_ID, R.NAME AS R_NAME, R.PHONE AS R_PHONE, R.EMAIL AS R_EMAIL, R.BIRTH AS R_BIRTH, R.ADDRESS AS R_ADDRESS, R.SEARCH_ME AS R_SEARCH_ME, R.GENDER AS R_GENDER, R.MINIMI AS R_MINIMI, R.ACORN AS R_ACORN, G.PRODUCT_CODE AS P_PRODUCT_CODE, P.CATEGORY_CODE AS P_CATEGORY_CODE, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS P_PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS P_PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_DATE AS P_PRODUCT_DATE, P.STATUS AS P_STATUS, P.PRODUCT_FILE AS P_PRODUCT_FILE, P.PRODUCT_URL AS P_PRODUCT_URL FROM GIFT G INNER JOIN MEMBER S ON (G.SENDER_NO = S.USER_NO) INNER JOIN MEMBER R ON (G.RECEIVER_NO = R.USER_NO) INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (G.PRODUCT_CODE = P.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE GIFT_NO = #{giftNo}

SELECT G.GIFT_NO, G.SEND_CONTENT , G.GIFT_DATE , G.GIFT_PROGRESS , G.GIFT_CANCEL , G.SENDER_NO AS S_USER_NO, S.USER_ID AS S_USER_ID, S.NAME AS S_NAME, S.PHONE AS S_PHONE, S.EMAIL AS S_EMAIL, S.BIRTH AS S_BIRTH, S.ADDRESS AS S_ADDRESS, S.SEARCH_ME AS S_SEARCH_ME, S.GENDER AS S_GENDER, S.MINIMI AS S_MINIMI, S.ACORN AS S_ACORN, G.RECEIVER_NO AS R_USER_NO, R.USER_ID AS R_USER_ID, R.NAME AS R_NAME, R.PHONE AS R_PHONE, R.EMAIL AS R_EMAIL, R.BIRTH AS R_BIRTH, R.ADDRESS AS R_ADDRESS, R.SEARCH_ME AS R_SEARCH_ME, R.GENDER AS R_GENDER, R.MINIMI AS R_MINIMI, R.ACORN AS R_ACORN, G.PRODUCT_CODE AS P_PRODUCT_CODE, P.CATEGORY_CODE AS P_CATEGORY_CODE, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS P_PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS P_PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_DATE AS P_PRODUCT_DATE, P.STATUS AS P_STATUS, P.PRODUCT_FILE AS P_PRODUCT_FILE, P.PRODUCT_URL AS P_PRODUCT_URL FROM GIFT G INNER JOIN MEMBER S ON (G.SENDER_NO = S.USER_NO) INNER JOIN MEMBER R ON (G.RECEIVER_NO = R.USER_NO) INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (G.PRODUCT_CODE = P.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE G.SENDER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY GIFT_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GIFT WHERE SENDER_NO = #{userNo} AND DATE_FORMAT(GIFT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{date1}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{date2}, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY GIFT_DATE DESC

SELECT G.GIFT_NO, G.SEND_CONTENT , G.GIFT_DATE , G.GIFT_PROGRESS , G.GIFT_CANCEL , G.SENDER_NO AS S_USER_NO, S.USER_ID AS S_USER_ID, S.NAME AS S_NAME, S.PHONE AS S_PHONE, S.EMAIL AS S_EMAIL, S.BIRTH AS S_BIRTH, S.ADDRESS AS S_ADDRESS, S.SEARCH_ME AS S_SEARCH_ME, S.GENDER AS S_GENDER, S.MINIMI AS S_MINIMI, S.ACORN AS S_ACORN, G.RECEIVER_NO AS R_USER_NO, R.USER_ID AS R_USER_ID, R.NAME AS R_NAME, R.PHONE AS R_PHONE, R.EMAIL AS R_EMAIL, R.BIRTH AS R_BIRTH, R.ADDRESS AS R_ADDRESS, R.SEARCH_ME AS R_SEARCH_ME, R.GENDER AS R_GENDER, R.MINIMI AS R_MINIMI, R.ACORN AS R_ACORN, G.PRODUCT_CODE AS P_PRODUCT_CODE, P.CATEGORY_CODE AS P_CATEGORY_CODE, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS P_PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS P_PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_DATE AS P_PRODUCT_DATE, P.STATUS AS P_STATUS, P.PRODUCT_FILE AS P_PRODUCT_FILE, P.PRODUCT_URL AS P_PRODUCT_URL FROM GIFT G INNER JOIN MEMBER S ON (G.SENDER_NO = S.USER_NO) INNER JOIN MEMBER R ON (G.RECEIVER_NO = R.USER_NO) INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (G.PRODUCT_CODE = P.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE G.SENDER_NO = #{userNo} AND DATE_FORMAT(GIFT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{date1}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{date2}, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY GIFT_DATE DESC

SELECT G.GIFT_NO, G.SEND_CONTENT , G.GIFT_DATE , G.GIFT_PROGRESS , G.GIFT_CANCEL , G.SENDER_NO AS S_USER_NO, S.USER_ID AS S_USER_ID, S.NAME AS S_NAME, S.PHONE AS S_PHONE, S.EMAIL AS S_EMAIL, S.BIRTH AS S_BIRTH, S.ADDRESS AS S_ADDRESS, S.SEARCH_ME AS S_SEARCH_ME, S.GENDER AS S_GENDER, S.MINIMI AS S_MINIMI, S.ACORN AS S_ACORN, G.RECEIVER_NO AS R_USER_NO, R.USER_ID AS R_USER_ID, R.NAME AS R_NAME, R.PHONE AS R_PHONE, R.EMAIL AS R_EMAIL, R.BIRTH AS R_BIRTH, R.ADDRESS AS R_ADDRESS, R.SEARCH_ME AS R_SEARCH_ME, R.GENDER AS R_GENDER, R.MINIMI AS R_MINIMI, R.ACORN AS R_ACORN, G.PRODUCT_CODE AS P_PRODUCT_CODE, P.CATEGORY_CODE AS P_CATEGORY_CODE, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS P_PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS P_PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_DATE AS P_PRODUCT_DATE, P.STATUS AS P_STATUS, P.PRODUCT_FILE AS P_PRODUCT_FILE, P.PRODUCT_URL AS P_PRODUCT_URL FROM GIFT G INNER JOIN MEMBER S ON (G.SENDER_NO = S.USER_NO) INNER JOIN MEMBER R ON (G.RECEIVER_NO = R.USER_NO) INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (G.PRODUCT_CODE = P.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE G.RECEIVER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY GIFT_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GIFT WHERE RECEIVER_NO = #{userNo} AND DATE_FORMAT(GIFT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{date1}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{date2}, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY GIFT_DATE DESC

SELECT G.GIFT_NO, G.SEND_CONTENT , G.GIFT_DATE , G.GIFT_PROGRESS , G.GIFT_CANCEL , G.SENDER_NO AS S_USER_NO, S.USER_ID AS S_USER_ID, S.NAME AS S_NAME, S.PHONE AS S_PHONE, S.EMAIL AS S_EMAIL, S.BIRTH AS S_BIRTH, S.ADDRESS AS S_ADDRESS, S.SEARCH_ME AS S_SEARCH_ME, S.GENDER AS S_GENDER, S.MINIMI AS S_MINIMI, S.ACORN AS S_ACORN, G.RECEIVER_NO AS R_USER_NO, R.USER_ID AS R_USER_ID, R.NAME AS R_NAME, R.PHONE AS R_PHONE, R.EMAIL AS R_EMAIL, R.BIRTH AS R_BIRTH, R.ADDRESS AS R_ADDRESS, R.SEARCH_ME AS R_SEARCH_ME, R.GENDER AS R_GENDER, R.MINIMI AS R_MINIMI, R.ACORN AS R_ACORN, G.PRODUCT_CODE AS P_PRODUCT_CODE, P.CATEGORY_CODE AS P_CATEGORY_CODE, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS P_PRODUCT_NAME, P.PRODUCT_PRICE AS P_PRODUCT_PRICE, P.PRODUCT_DATE AS P_PRODUCT_DATE, P.STATUS AS P_STATUS, P.PRODUCT_FILE AS P_PRODUCT_FILE, P.PRODUCT_URL AS P_PRODUCT_URL FROM GIFT G INNER JOIN MEMBER S ON (G.SENDER_NO = S.USER_NO) INNER JOIN MEMBER R ON (G.RECEIVER_NO = R.USER_NO) INNER JOIN PRODUCT P ON (G.PRODUCT_CODE = P.PRODUCT_CODE) WHERE G.RECEIVER_NO = #{userNo} AND DATE_FORMAT(GIFT_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(#{date1}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND STR_TO_DATE(#{date2}, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY GIFT_DATE DESC
